file.name: Moxa PoC Operational Design System v1.0

discovery.fontDecision: Use Inter for editable Figma documentation because Helvetica Neue and Arial are unavailable in the plugin environment. Preserve Helvetica Neue / Helvetica / Arial as the implementation font stack and label the Figma fallback explicitly.

subscribed.name: Material 3 Design Kit
subscribed.reason: mobile-first visual language and token model do not match Moxa web implementation

subscribed.name: Simple Design System
subscribed.reason: useful structural examples but incompatible brand variables and component API

libraries.decision: Rebuild Moxa components locally with native Moxa variables. Use Simple Design System only as an API and auto-layout reference.

collections.modeStrategy: one-mode collections for Backup Starter compatibility

fallback.decision: Use separate one-mode collections in Backup Starter plan; approved by the user.
fallback.reason: Starter limits collections to one mode and the direct Figma MCP write quota was reached.
fallback.completionMessage: Moxa Design System created: 10 collections, 54 components, 31 pages.
